ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the research instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research instrument */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the research instrument was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the research instrument was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the research instrument (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the instrument */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last modified the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_instruments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_instruments_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructs" (
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct */,
  "construct_name" TEXT /* Name of the construct */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the construct */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the construct (e.g., psychological, cognitive) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or reference for the construct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "range" TEXT /* Valid range of values for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_constructs" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research instrument */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construct */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the construct within the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_metrics" (
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construct */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the construct */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the metric value */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construct_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research instrument */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the research instrument */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the research instrument was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_versions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES research_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construct */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the construct */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, experiment) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id")
)
